Package neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

Class GasDispersionResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.GasDispersionResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GasDispersionResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from a gas dispersion screening calculation.

The result is deliberately compact so it can be used from process simulations, dynamic release studies, notebooks, MCP tools and QRA workflows without depending on a CFD model. Distances are centerline screening distances from the release point and should be validated with detailed dispersion software for layout or regulatory decisions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    GasDispersionResult(String scenarioName, String selectedModel, double massReleaseRateKgPerS, double flammableMassReleaseRateKgPerS, double sourceDensityKgPerM3, double airDensityKgPerM3, double fuelMoleFraction, double fuelMassFraction, double lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction, double distanceToHalfLflM, double distanceToLflM, double flammableCloudVolumeM3, String toxicComponentName, double toxicThresholdPpm, double toxicDistanceM, double windSpeedMPerS, char stabilityClass, String screeningBasis)
    Creates a gas dispersion result using 50 percent LFL as the configured endpoint.

  • Constructor Details

    • GasDispersionResult

      public GasDispersionResult(String scenarioName, String selectedModel, double massReleaseRateKgPerS, double flammableMassReleaseRateKgPerS, double sourceDensityKgPerM3, double airDensityKgPerM3, double fuelMoleFraction, double fuelMassFraction, double lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction, double flammableEndpointFractionOfLfl, double distanceToFlammableEndpointM, double distanceToHalfLflM, double distanceToLflM, double flammableCloudVolumeM3, String toxicComponentName, double toxicThresholdPpm, double toxicDistanceM, double windSpeedMPerS, char stabilityClass, String screeningBasis)
      Creates a gas dispersion result.
      Parameters:
      scenarioName - scenario identifier
      selectedModel - selected dispersion model name
      massReleaseRateKgPerS - total released gas mass rate in kg/s
      flammableMassReleaseRateKgPerS - released flammable mass rate in kg/s
      sourceDensityKgPerM3 - expanded source gas density in kg/m3
      airDensityKgPerM3 - ambient air density in kg/m3
      fuelMoleFraction - fuel mole fraction in the released gas
      fuelMassFraction - fuel mass fraction in the released gas
      lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction - lower flammable limit as volume fraction in air
      flammableEndpointFractionOfLfl - endpoint concentration fraction of LFL
      distanceToFlammableEndpointM - distance to configured endpoint in m
      distanceToHalfLflM - distance to 50 percent LFL in m
      distanceToLflM - distance to 100 percent LFL in m
      flammableCloudVolumeM3 - estimated flammable cloud volume in m3
      toxicComponentName - toxic component name, or empty string when not evaluated
      toxicThresholdPpm - toxic endpoint threshold in ppm
      toxicDistanceM - distance to the toxic endpoint in m
      windSpeedMPerS - wind speed used in m/s
      stabilityClass - Pasquill stability class A to F
      screeningBasis - text describing the screening method basis

    • GasDispersionResult

      public GasDispersionResult(String scenarioName, String selectedModel, double massReleaseRateKgPerS, double flammableMassReleaseRateKgPerS, double sourceDensityKgPerM3, double airDensityKgPerM3, double fuelMoleFraction, double fuelMassFraction, double lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction, double distanceToHalfLflM, double distanceToLflM, double flammableCloudVolumeM3, String toxicComponentName, double toxicThresholdPpm, double toxicDistanceM, double windSpeedMPerS, char stabilityClass, String screeningBasis)
      Creates a gas dispersion result using 50 percent LFL as the configured endpoint.
      Parameters:
      scenarioName - scenario identifier
      selectedModel - selected dispersion model name
      massReleaseRateKgPerS - total released gas mass rate in kg/s
      flammableMassReleaseRateKgPerS - released flammable mass rate in kg/s
      sourceDensityKgPerM3 - expanded source gas density in kg/m3
      airDensityKgPerM3 - ambient air density in kg/m3
      fuelMoleFraction - fuel mole fraction in the released gas
      fuelMassFraction - fuel mass fraction in the released gas
      lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction - lower flammable limit as volume fraction in air
      distanceToHalfLflM - distance to 50 percent LFL in m
      distanceToLflM - distance to 100 percent LFL in m
      flammableCloudVolumeM3 - estimated flammable cloud volume in m3
      toxicComponentName - toxic component name, or empty string when not evaluated
      toxicThresholdPpm - toxic endpoint threshold in ppm
      toxicDistanceM - distance to the toxic endpoint in m
      windSpeedMPerS - wind speed used in m/s
      stabilityClass - Pasquill stability class A to F
      screeningBasis - text describing the screening method basis

    • getFlammableEndpointFractionOfLfl

      public double getFlammableEndpointFractionOfLfl()
      Gets the configured flammable endpoint fraction of LFL.
      Returns:
      endpoint fraction of LFL, for example 0.20 or 0.50

    • getDistanceToFlammableEndpointM

      public double getDistanceToFlammableEndpointM()
      Gets the distance to the configured flammable endpoint.
      Returns:
      distance to configured endpoint in m, or NaN if not reached

    • getDistanceToHalfLflM

      public double getDistanceToHalfLflM()
      Gets the distance to 50 percent LFL.
      Returns:
      distance in m, or NaN if no flammable endpoint is reached

    • getDistanceToLflM

      public double getDistanceToLflM()
      Gets the distance to 100 percent LFL.
      Returns:
      distance in m, or NaN if no flammable endpoint is reached

    • getFlammableCloudVolumeM3

      public double getFlammableCloudVolumeM3()
      Gets the estimated flammable cloud volume.
      Returns:
      flammable cloud volume in m3

    • getToxicComponentName

      public String getToxicComponentName()
      Gets the toxic component evaluated.
      Returns:
      toxic component name, or an empty string if not evaluated

    • getToxicThresholdPpm

      public double getToxicThresholdPpm()
      Gets the toxic threshold.
      Returns:
      toxic threshold in ppm

    • getToxicDistanceM

      public double getToxicDistanceM()
      Gets the toxic endpoint distance.
      Returns:
      toxic endpoint distance in m, or NaN if not evaluated or not reached

    • getWindSpeedMPerS

      public double getWindSpeedMPerS()
      Gets the wind speed used.
      Returns:
      wind speed in m/s

    • getStabilityClass

      public char getStabilityClass()
      Gets the Pasquill stability class used.
      Returns:
      stability class A to F

    • getScreeningBasis

      public String getScreeningBasis()
      Gets the screening basis text.
      Returns:
      screening basis

    • hasFlammableCloud

      public boolean hasFlammableCloud()
      Checks whether a flammable endpoint was found.
      Returns:
      true if a finite LFL distance was calculated

    • hasToxicEndpoint

      public boolean hasToxicEndpoint()
      Checks whether a toxic endpoint was found.
      Returns:
      true if a finite toxic distance was calculated

      Export the result as a compact JSON object.
